attendees: Dr. Mwila Phiri (Chair), Mateyo Kavindele (CEO), CFO, 5 Non-Executive Directors, Company Secretary
agenda: 1. FY2024 Annual Results Review; 2. FY2025 Q1 Portfolio Performance; 3. Dividend Declaration; 4. Privatisation Programme Update; 5. Risk Register Review
resolutions: Approved FY2024 annual results. Declared interim dividend of ZMW 220 million. Approved privatisation mandate for two portfolio companies. Risk register noted.

attendees: Dr. Mwila Phiri (Chair), Mateyo Kavindele (CEO), CFO, 4 Non-Executive Directors
agenda: 1. Emergency Liquidity Support — Zambia Railways; 2. ZAFCO Acquisition Update
resolutions: Approved ZMW 150 million emergency bridging facility to Zambia Railways subject to Ministry of Finance concurrence. Approved ZAFCO acquisition terms.

attendees: Dr. Mwila Phiri (Chair), Mabvuto Chipata (CEO), CFO, 6 Non-Executive Directors, Company Secretary

resolutions: FY2024 results noted. Mine rehabilitation fund actuarial review commissioned. Dividend of ZMW 275 million recommended to AGM. ESG report approved for publication.
